assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a business email address.
No Datadog organization, site selection, API key, Agent, or product instrumentation exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Datadog trial account and reach a first observable telemetry result for one chosen Datadog product.

first_success.outcome: First telemetry for the selected Datadog product is visible in the Datadog UI.
first_success.observable_signal: For the representative Agent candidate, Metrics Summary shows datadog.agent.started or datadog.agent.running with host and Agent version tags.

route_selection.surface: Datadog Getting Started and product-specific install guides
route_selection.rule: Select the shortest complete trial-to-first-signal route only after one product and install surface are fixed.

candidates.name: Linux host Agent via Fleet Automation
candidates.reason: Documented Agent getting-started path with default Agent metrics, but Getting Started does not make Agent the sole platform default.

candidates.name: HTTP API first request
candidates.reason: Peer getting-started route using API and application keys instead of an installed Agent.

candidates.name: APM tracing, Logs, RUM, Synthetics, CI Visibility, Security, and other product guides
candidates.reason: Official Getting Started lists many product areas with unrelated first-success signals.

candidates.name: Container, Kubernetes, cloud, and config-management Agent installs
candidates.reason: Peer Agent platforms with different installers, permissions, and verification.

required_path.action: Start a Datadog free trial and create the organization.

required_fields.label: Trial signup fields (email, region, remaining account details, agreements)
required_fields.notes: Marketing trial page confirms a 14-day trial and Get Started Free CTA, but the interactive form field set was not fully recoverable from public fetches.

required_path.observable_result: The developer has an authenticated Datadog organization on a chosen site.

required_path.action: Choose a Datadog product area and complete its documented first-install path to a first signal.

required_fields.label: Install and verification steps for the chosen product

required_path.observable_result: The selected product shows its first telemetry in Datadog.

prerequisites.description: Access appropriate for the eventually selected install surface (for example a supported host if using the Agent route).

external_gates.description: Self-service trial signup depends on Datadog accepting the provided identity and creating the organization.

unavoidable_waits.description: After Agent or other collectors start, Datadog must receive and index the first metrics or events before UI verification.

platform_outcomes.description: A successful Agent install reports datadog.agent.running / datadog.agent.started among other default checks.
Fleet Automation can generate the in-app install script once an account and API key exist.

excluded.item: Datadog Learning Center Quick Start hosted lab
excluded.reason: Training environment with trial compute rather than onboarding the developer's own systems.
Documentation is evidence, not a product action.

sources.title: Getting Started
evidence_supported: Agent listed among peer getting-started paths

sources.title: Account management users
evidence_supported: Organization membership and user access concepts

sources.title: Account management
evidence_supported: Account and organization management docs entry

uncertainties.question: Which Datadog product and install surface should define first success?
uncertainties.impact: Agent metrics, API requests, traces, logs, RUM, Synthetics, and security findings have unrelated actions and terminal signals.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A corpus-level product choice plus a cold-account walkthrough of that product's current install and verification UI.

uncertainties.question: What exact fields does the current Datadog trial signup form require?
uncertainties.impact: Required field counts and region selection cannot be finalized from public marketing pages alone.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated capture of the live trial registration form listing every required control.
